text: Met with Daniel R. at 8:15 at River House. He was direct: wants no more pitch decks until we solve cash drag. Reviewed $4.8mm idle from April property sale; he agreed to 90-day T-bills ladder pending tax call. Mentioned daughter transferring to USC, possible education funding discussion in Q3. Follow up with rates sheet and intro to estate team.

RM: I saw the wire request for $625k to Marlow Capital. Is that for the co-investment you flagged?
Client: Yes, closing Friday. I need it clean, no delay like last time.
RM: Understood. We still need verbal confirmation from Elise since the funds are from the joint revocable trust.
Client: She is available after 2:30.
RM: I will call her then and keep Treasury on notice.

Pre-meeting brief: Priya and Arjun Mehta, 6/18, office. Agenda should stay tight: liquidity after sale of Palo Alto duplex, concentrated NVDA position, and trust update before July travel. Priya dislikes product-first conversations; lead with balance sheet and tax timing. Arjun asked twice about Lombard credit but has not committed. Bring current pledge advance rates and downside case at 35% equity drawdown.

Complaint record opened by RM. Client: Margaret L. Issue: client states March muni bond purchase was presented as 'cash equivalent' and is upset by unrealized loss shown on May statement. She says she would not have approved duration over 3 years. Reviewed call notes; suitability language present but no explicit duration recap. Escalated to Market Manager and Compliance. Client requests written explanation and fee waiver.
